header.location: Seattle, WA (Open to Hybrid or Relocation)

summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) People Operations professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve the people experience and keep operations running smoothly—through human-centered, organized approaches.

bullets.text: Manage end-to-end {coord|lifecycles for 20+ programs} and 10+ vendors, refining delivery strategy and operations via {data|feedback analysis}
Develop guides and {coord|workflows} for 70+ {cross|cross-functional} staff, improving onboarding knowledge and reducing onboarding time by 75%
Facilitate training webinars for 600+ participants, enhancing {prog|program understanding} and engagement
Conduct needs assessments with 25+ global {cross|stakeholders} to identify gaps and design 3 new programs
Facilitate CEO/HR discovery interviews to diagnose absenteeism, then {data|analyze} 300+ leave cases—surfacing $362K in costs driving policy redesigns
Conduct focus groups and 1:1 interviews with an NGO leadership team to surface decision-making and {cross|accountability} gaps
Optimized {coord|onboarding} across 3 global locations via process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities
Facilitated organizational change by directing a Mergers & Acquisitions project, migrating and merging employee records
Initiated a DEI pilot with an Inclusive Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Improved {ex|employee experience} by streamlining immigration and relocation processes with cross-functional teams
Filled a challenging international role by {coord|drafting job descriptions, posting openings}, and researching global compensation
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated C-suite panels at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
Developed proficiency across HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Analyzed 2,000+ employee experiences to amplify employee voice and guide C-suite decisions on satisfaction drivers
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable engagement reports
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI and performance review
